turns.prompt: A flood of cheap imports is about to close the last big factory in a town that has nothing else.

choices.label: Slap tariffs on the cheap imports
choices.flavour: Protect the jobs you can see.

delayed.headline: Trading partners retaliate; your exporters start to bleed

choices.reaction: Factory towns cheer. Shoppers brace for higher prices.

choices.label: Embrace open markets fully
choices.reaction: Consumers win. The factory town empties out.

choices.label: Subsidise retraining for displaced workers
choices.reaction: A bridge to new jobs — if the new jobs ever appear.

turns.prompt: The economy steadies. You can think about the shape of the next decade.

choices.label: Pick and fund strategic industries
choices.reaction: Bets placed on the industries of tomorrow.

choices.label: Cut red tape to attract investment

delayed.headline: A deregulated industry cut corners and people got hurt

choices.reaction: Capital floods in. The safeguards thin out.

choices.label: Strengthen worker protections
choices.flavour: Tilt the deal back to labour.
choices.reaction: Workers gain ground. Some firms pack up and leave.

turns.prompt: A full-blown trade war erupts. Your key exports are blocked at the border.

choices.label: Escalate with sweeping counter-tariffs
choices.reaction: You won't be pushed around. Prices climb everywhere.

choices.label: Swallow your pride and negotiate a deal
Pivot hard toward self-sufficiency
choices.reaction: Resilient and costly. The shelves look different now.

turns.prompt: The decisions you made for the economy now arrive with human faces.

memory_callbacks.text: The open-market gamble hollowed out the towns now demanding answers.
The deregulation you championed has produced a disaster with a human cost.
The tariffs you imposed triggered the trade war now strangling your exports.
Your tariff escalation has frozen the ports solid.

choices.label: Negotiate a managed, fairer trade pact
choices.flavour: A deal everyone can live with.
choices.reaction: A compromise nobody loves and everybody signs.

choices.label: Wall off the economy to save jobs
choices.reaction: Jobs saved behind the wall. Growth left outside it.

choices.label: Bet the recovery on new industries
choices.reaction: A leap toward tomorrow. Today's workers must keep up.

turns.prompt: The dust settles on the trade wars. What kind of economy did you build?

choices.label: An open economy with a strong safety net
choices.flavour: Open to the world, kind at home.
choices.reaction: Open to the world, kinder at home. The balance is delicate.

choices.label: A self-reliant fortress economy
choices.reaction: Secure and self-made. Poorer, but yours.

choices.label: An unapologetic growth machine
choices.reaction: The GDP soars. The gaps widen with it.
